 Prepare for the Golden Age of space exploration! 

The next phase of the Galactic Asset Offering launches on February 3 at 9 AM PST (5 PM UTC)  - and it begins with the Fimbul Airbike drop! 

 Learn about what's in store for the coming ships, $ATLAS & more: https://medium.com/star-atlas/2022-inaugural-spaceship-nft-drop-golden-age-of-space-exploration-759328e6949
